_note: This file controls the Live CSS Editor launcher menu.
_tip: You can edit this file to add, remove, or change items. Save it, then re-open the launcher to see your changes. No coding needed.

push_repos._note: Use __project__ as a shortcut for this project's folder.
push_repos.label: Push live
push_repos.description: Commit and push Live CSS Editor to GitHub

tools._note: script is relative to this project's folder, or an absolute path.
tools.label: Code Review
tools.description: Scan your code for issues and get a report

tools.label: DB Browser
tools.description: Browse and query your project databases

tools.label: Auth: Smoke Email 2FA
tools.description: Run end-to-end email 2FA smoke test against xcm_auth (happy path + negative checks)

tools.label: Auth: Reset Dev State
tools.description: Clear smoke-created runtime rows from xcm_auth_dev.db without removing users

tools.label: Email Inbox Viewer
tools.description: Open the local email inbox browser (requires inbox service on port 8025)
